response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience and some exposure to AI-agent tooling, they lack demonstrated production leadership in multi-agent AI systems within fintech, show no evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+, and have no measurable experience in regulated financial systems, credit risk, or working-capital automation — all core requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven systems and distributed architectures
Has contributed to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (MCP frameworks)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of leading AI systems in fintech or regulated financial environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people
No mention of real-time credit risk, liquidity optimization, or compliance infrastructure
